root_cause: Pod is stuck due to circular dependency between scheduling and WaitForFirstConsumer volume binding
evidence: Referenced PVCs remain Pending under WaitForFirstConsumer binding
Scheduler messages indicate volumes could not be bound for scheduling
PVC binding progress is stalled waiting for a consumer or compatible volume
Dominant scheduler message: 0/2 nodes are available: 2 node(s) didn't find available persistent volumes to bind.

causes.message: Volume binding and scheduler placement cannot make forward progress together
Scheduler repeatedly retries placement while PVC binding remains unresolved
Pod remains Pending because topology-aware volume binding never resolves

pod:volume-deadlock-pod: Pod cannot be scheduled because topology-aware volume binding is unresolved
pvc:data-pvc: PVC remains Pending under a WaitForFirstConsumer StorageClass

likely_causes: StorageClass uses WaitForFirstConsumer and no feasible node-volume pairing exists
Available volumes cannot satisfy topology or capacity requirements for any candidate node
PVC binding and pod placement are waiting on each other without progress
suggested_checks: Check volumeBindingMode on the referenced StorageClass
Inspect PV availability and topology constraints
